package.name: safety_orchestrator_g1
package.description: Safety orchestrator for G1 ROS2 Pipeline. Owns compound state (Risk Level, Restriction Level). Evaluates SafetyEvents and executes transitions. Publishes /system_state, /safety_events, /safety_actions, /diagnostics. Defined by ADR-002 + SAFETY_MODEL_G1.md. Transition logic TBD — pending Capa 4 completion. Threading: callbacks ingest-only, evaluation loop dedicated thread.
